title: lonchocarpus cultratus
intro: Lonchocarpus cultratus, also known as the "Tangle-Leaf" tree, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family, Fabaceae. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to inhibit the growth of certain bacteria and fungi, and has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments. The health benefits of Lonchocarpus cultratus include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of the plant include extracts and infusions that can be used to treat conditions such as fever, cough, and digestive issues.
